data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp uses a Microservices architecture to scale its functionalities across various platforms seamlessly.
data.technical_spec: Deployed using Kubernetes with services like message routing, delivery confirmations, and media handling separated.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: All messages, calls, photos, and videos are encrypted.
data.technical_spec: Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) 256-bit, Transport Layer Security (TLS).

data.title: Global CDN Usage
data.description: To ensure speed and availability, WhatsApp uses a global content delivery network.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS CloudFront and Akamai for edge caching.

data.title: Data Redundancy
data.description: WhatsApp employs redundant data storage to ensure data durability and availability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes multi-region AWS S3 with cross-region replication.

data.title: Real-Time Communication
data.description: The architecture supports real-time texting and calling.
data.technical_spec: WebSockets protocol used to maintain low-latency connections.
